data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of an optional link to the source fulfillment assignment/unit, as specified in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement is met. The lack of concrete evidence to support the existence of this link constitutes a clear gap in the validation process.
gaps: No evidence confirming the presence of an optional link to the source fulfillment assignment/unit.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for source fulfillment link
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the response includes an optional link to the source fulfillment assignment/unit.
